author: Kevin Hermawan
message: release: 3.0.3

author: Kevin Hermawan
message: chore: updates dependencies (#135)

author: Philipp
message:
Handle incomplete response (#131)

Due to a task cancellation, the response can be incomplete.
- `tempResponse` must be cleared
- response should highlighted as incomplete/cancelled/aborted

author: Philipp
message:
Fix sidebar content (#129)

* Ignore <think> tags in response shown in sidebar

* Improve title generation (especially for DeepSeek)

author: Kevin Hermawan
message: release: 3.0.2

author: Philipp
message:
Feature: Allow configuration of font size used for markdown rendering (#83)

* Adding a font size setting which will modify the "defaultFontSize" setting

* Make sure messages scale according to the configured "font size".

* Show the system font size in the placeholder text

* Adding menu entry with keyboard shortcuts

* Make sure setting stays in sync with `Defaults` value

* Rename to `fontSize` and use `NSFont.systemFontSize` as default value

* Fix access to font size

* Use `fontSize` from `Defaults` directly
Add a reset button to restore to default.

* User `Defaults` features to reset and show "default value"

* Move to independent GroupBox

* Fix layout

* Fix font size settings view

* Fix some hardcoded font sizes

* Make font size, code highlighting and color scheme dynamically adjustable

author: Philipp
message: Fixing "stop" button while generation is ongoing (#128)

author: Philipp
message:
Fix chat window shortcuts (#126)

* Set keyboard shortcuts
- CMD+Shift : open new Window
- CMD+N: start new Chat

* New chats should automatically focus on the prompt

* Delay switching focus to prompt

author: Harry
message:
Added blockquote markdown support for r1 model thinking (#125)

* Added blockquote markdown support for r1 model thinking

* Updated blockquote to accommodate empty tag content

---------

Co-authored-by: Harry <harry.heffs2222@gmail.com>

author: Kevin Hermawan
message: fix: title generation for `deepseek-r1` model (#127)

author: Philipp
message:
Avoid empty prompts (#124)

* Avoid sending empty prompt to Ollama
- Disable `CircleButton` on empty prompt
- Abort `generateAction` if prompt is empty

* Trim whitespaces from prompt before processing

author: Kevin Hermawan
message: release: 3.0.1

author: Philipp
message:
Fix syntax highlighting issues (#121)

* Fix unreadable code blocks if highlighting is disabled
- Derive background colors from color scheme

* `CodeBlocks` should depend on unique `CodeHighlighter` color scheme
This fixes "unreadable code" problem (as in #113) when no code highlighting is enabled.
Also this enables dynamic switching of dark/light mode and enabling/disabling syntax highlighting

* Remove debugging `print()`

author: Szymon Łopaciuk
message:
Increase margin and enable wrapping of bullet point items (#120)

Signed-off-by: Szymon Łopaciuk <szymon@lopaciuk.eu>

author: Jonas
message: closes #103: Ollamac should open to a New Chat automatically (#114)
